Appearances:
Plaintiff Darril Hudson is present.
Attorney Brenda C. Keith appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Audrey Korn and John Trudeau is present.
Attorney Hope Greenhill representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Hon. Judge Ellen Chaitin , litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 505, for settlement discussions. This case did NOT settle. The trial date of June -18-2012 remains on calendar.(D501)
